creator: hostmaster@GTS.NET
text:
some more info -

previous host was 10.1 rev 273560
previous virtualbox 4.2.6

after disabling the hpet timer in the vm config it seems to work ok currently;
the freebsd 9.1 vm is also running with hpet timer enabled, yet it works fine

both are running in "tickfree" mode (kern.eventtimer.periodic=0)
